name: OpenClaw
project_binding_recipe: Bind the OpenClaw workspace and expose only the aliases required for the task.
approval_path: Let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session, then use window grants for long OpenClaw execution loops.
safe_inject_path: Use the stdio tool path for hasp_run and hasp_inject.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env with convenience approval when OpenClaw needs a project-visible env file.
